project_context.target_audience: Corporate businesses, Government, Education, Manufacturing, Healthcare, Finance, SMEs, Large Enterprises.
project_context.vibe: Clean, elegant, minimal, premium, sophisticated, enterprise-grade, comparable to Microsoft, Cisco, IBM, Oracle.

typography.instructions: Avoid using Inter for headings to prevent a generic AI look. Use Outfit for a geometric, modern Microsoft-like enterprise feel, and Plus Jakarta Sans for high legibility in body text. Maintain tight tracking on headings.

colors.instructions: Ensure WCAG AA contrast ratios minimum (4.5:1 for body). Stick to this strictly professional palette. Do NOT overuse purple.

visual_enhancers.instructions: Use glass effects ONLY on sticky navs, floating chat buttons, or overlay cards. Do not overuse. Rounded corners should be soft but enterprise-appropriate (e.g., 12px or 16px, not completely pill-shaped for standard cards).

components.hero: Immersive dark navy section with moving gradient. Very subtle network particles or grid in the background. Large heading left-aligned or centered, max width for readability. Two CTAs: Primary gradient button, Secondary outline button.
components.service_card: Soft shadow, rounded-2xl, crisp icon on top-left or centered. Hover: Lifts up (-translate-y-2) and shadow deepens. Subtle animated bottom border on hover.
components.stat_card: Minimalist, large numerical value (animated counter), small descriptive text. Subtle background hue of the primary color.
components.technology_logo_card: Use react-icons or grayscale SVGs. Container has a 1px border that glows on hover. The logo turns full color on hover.
components.industry_card: Background image with a dark gradient overlay. Text at the bottom. On hover, the image scales up slightly inside the hidden overflow container.
components.timeline: Vertical line on the left. Animated dots that light up as user scrolls down (GSAP ScrollTrigger).
components.contact_form: Split layout: Left side has contact info (Map, Phone, Email, WhatsApp button). Right side has Shadcn form. Clean, floating label inputs.
components.floating_chatbot: Fixed bottom-right. Soft glowing shadow. When clicked, opens a chat interface with suggested questions. Use Lucide bot icon.
components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header. Animated underlines on links. Dark/Light theme toggle included.

layouts.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align large paragraphs for readability. Use 'Bento' style grid for the Why Choose Us section.

motion.global_rules: 60 FPS, professional, smooth. NO bouncy or overly playful animations. Use Framer Motion and GSAP.

patterns.fade_up: Initial: opacity 0, y 20. Animate: opacity 1, y 0. Duration 0.6s, ease out.
patterns.parallax: Subtle y-axis translation on background shapes using framer-motion useScroll.
patterns.magnetic_button: Use framer-motion useMotionValue for subtle x/y shift on hover.
patterns.scroll_progress: Fixed top bar, height 3px, origin-left, scaleX bound to scroll progress.
patterns.text_reveal: Overflow hidden on line wrappers, translate y 100% to 0.

accessibility.contrast: Always ensure text meets APCA/WCAG AA against backgrounds.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect 'prefers-reduced-motion'. Turn off parallax/magnetic effects if true.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').

media.instructions: Use images as backgrounds with dark overlays (e.g. bg-black/60) to maintain contrast. No generic placeholders allowed.

3d_libraries.recommendation: tsparticles (for the hero background network/particles), react-fast-marquee (for technology logos), framer-motion (for card interactions).

instructions_to_main_agent: Create the website using React and Tailwind CSS. Ensure all files use .js extension, not .tsx.
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned).
Use react-icons/si for technology logos (e.g., SiMicrosoft, SiCisco, SiDocker).
Implement a theme provider to support Dark Mode, Light Mode, and Auto (system preference).
Use standard HTML structure combined with Tailwind. Use Shadcn components for complex forms, selects, and dialogs.
Include a floating AI Chatbot button using framer-motion for smooth toggle.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Break the mold: use large typography, generous padding (p-12, py-24), and subtle grain overlays.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glassmorphism sparingly (max 1-2 elements per page).
Always use modern button styles with hover interaction.
Never use generic placeholder URLs. Use the provided image URLs.
All interactive elements must include a 'data-testid' attribute.
